title: BEM-878 verify machine decision
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:55 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
machine=load('governance/state/bem876_claude_machine_decision.json')
mail=read('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem876_claude_decision.md')
decision=machine.get('decision') or 'MISSING'
if decision=='APPROVED':
    status='machine_decision_approved'
    next_action='mark protocol approved and resume roadmap'
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED']:
    status='machine_decision_not_approved'
    next_action='apply required_changes from machine decision and re-request approval'
elif machine.get('_load_error'):
    status='machine_decision_invalid_json'
    next_action='repair Claude response format; invalid JSON decision file'
else:
    status='machine_decision_missing'
    next_action='repair Claude dispatcher/response writer; machine decision JSON missing'
state={'bem':'BEM-878','status':status,'decision':decision,'machine_decision':machine,'mailbox_preview':mail[:1200],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem878_verify_machine_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem878_verify_machine_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-878 | Verify Machine Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem878_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-878'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem878_verify_machine_decision.json','governance/reports/bem878_verify_machine_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem878_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified whether Claude produced the required machine-readable decision JSON and routed the next step')
"""
No issue comments.
